turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I'd like to schedule a pre-marital blood test package. Getting married next month.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Congratulations! Yes, we offer a comprehensive pre-marital health screening package. Your name and number?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Rohan Pillai. And my fiance's name is Ananya Bhat. 9867009988.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Lovely. The package includes blood group, HIV, thalassemia, blood sugar, and a few other standard tests. Both of you can come together. Next available date for two people is Thursday morning.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thursday morning works for us. What time?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: 9 AM, so you can get it done before work. Booked for Rohan Pillai and Ananya Bhat. Please come fasting for 8-10 hours. Congratulations once again!
